name: Great Prophet
uniques: Can instantly construct a [Holy site] improvement <by consuming this unit> <if it hasn't used other actions yet>
Can Spread Religion <for [1] movement> <[4] times> <after which this unit is consumed>
Removes other religions when spreading religion
May found a religion <by consuming this unit> <if it hasn't used other actions yet>
May enhance a religion <by consuming this unit>  <if it hasn't used other actions yet>
May enter foreign tiles without open borders
Takes your religion over the one in their birth city

name: Potential talent
uniques: [1] free [Strategist] units appear <by consuming this unit>
[1] free [Engineer] units appear <by consuming this unit>
[1] free [Scientist] units appear <by consuming this unit>
[1] free [Archaeologist] units appear <by consuming this unit>

[1] free [Scientist] units appear <when number of [RN1] is more than [499]> <when number of [RN1] is less than [750]> <for [AI player] Civilizations> <hidden from users>

[This Unit] takes [100] damage <upon turn end> <for [AI player] Civilizations> <hidden from users>
